name: memi
description: Design-system memory for coding agents: UI audits, Tailwind token extraction, shadcn registry workflows, Figma context, and interface-quality diagnostics.
long_description: memi gives MCP-compatible agents design-system memory and interface-quality tools. It exposes UI audits, Tailwind token extraction, shadcn registry workflows, Figma context, design docs, and implementation diagnostics through the @memi-design/cli npm package.
